sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101054" key="suntoruna/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συντορῡνάω</orth>, <sense id="n101054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stir with a spoon</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:8:46:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.46.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
